calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Assurance Of Voluntary Compliance
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Caitlin Whitwell Noble, Esq., State of California, Department of Justice, Office of the Attorney General, Telephone 415-510-3498, appearing for petitioner State of California;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for order approving assurance of voluntary compliance is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Two orders are signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
